description_long: This car store is a modern, two-story commercial building with a prominent glass facade at the front, allowing clear visibility into the showroom. The structure features a sloped dark roof and a combination of brick and glass materials, with the brickwork dominating the side and rear elevations. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, where a white car is parked, and a small patch of green lawn is visible at the rear. The front of the building is characterized by large, floor-to-ceiling windows, likely designed to showcase vehicles inside. The overall design is sleek and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The building appears to be set in an urban context, with a focus on accessibility and vehicle display.
description: A modern car store with a glass-fronted showroom, brick sides, and a driveway with a parked car. The design is sleek, with large windows and minimalistic features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass facade, main entrance, and a car parked on the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive brick wall, sloped roof, and the driveway with the car visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a green lawn area, back entrance, and the continuation of the brick and glass design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the brick wall, driveway, and the car, mirroring the other side.
attribute_displayed_cars: One white car parked in front of the building; no other cars visibly displayed inside the showroom.
attribute_glass_facade: Full-height glass panels at the front facade, framed and extending across the main entrance area.
